summary: Frontend testing of NT Commerce 12.0 Legendary Build - 7 NEW frontend pages. All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Create forms, dialogs, tabs, and backend integration all working.
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 new pages properly use data-testid attributes for testing
All pages correctly use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Dark theme styling consistent across all pages (bg-gray-800/50, border-gray-700)
RTL layout working correctly with Arabic text
Toast notifications working for success/error feedback
All CRUD operations integrated with backend APIs
seed_data_creation: Created via UI testing: 1 defective item (TEST_UI_Dialog_Product), 1 backup (BKP-00004), 1 task (TEST_UI_Task_Playwright), 1 chat room (TEST_Playwright_Room), 1 chat message, 1 task comment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new frontend pages tested and working: DefectiveGoodsPage, BackupSystemPage, SecurityDashboardPage, WalletPage, TaskManagementPage, InternalChatPage, SupplierTrackingPage. Sidebar navigation properly updated with new sections.

DefectiveGoodsPage.stats_display: PASS - Shows total cost, pending, confirmed counts
DefectiveGoodsPage.items_list: PASS - Lists defective items with badges

BackupSystemPage.stats_display: PASS - Shows backup count, size, records
BackupSystemPage.backups_list: PASS - Lists backups with download buttons

TaskManagementPage.stats_display: PASS - Shows total, pending, in_progress, completed
TaskManagementPage.tasks_list: PASS - Lists tasks with priority badges
TaskManagementPage.create_dialog: PASS - Opens with title, description, priority

InternalChatPage.rooms_sidebar: PASS - Shows room list with unread counts
InternalChatPage.chat_area: PASS - Shows messages and input field

SupplierTrackingPage.stats_display: PASS - Shows goods, orders, pending, preferred
SupplierTrackingPage.goods_tab: PASS - Lists supplier products with ratings
SupplierTrackingPage.orders_tab: PASS - Lists orders with status badges

SecurityDashboardPage.stats_display: PASS - Shows events, critical, blocked IPs
SecurityDashboardPage.tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: overview, blocked, keys, sessions

sidebar_navigation.tasks_chat_section: PASS - Contains task-management and internal-chat paths
sidebar_navigation.system_tools_section: PASS - Contains backup-system and wallet-management paths
